title: CSADeliveryAmount
description: In respect of a Valuation Date, the amount of collateral which a party is entitled to demand to be transferred to it as a Delivery Amount.

deliveryAmount.description: Specifies whether the meaning of Delivery Amount follows the pre-print definition or deviates from this (either based on a rating or some other methodology).

additionalLanguage.description: The additional language that might be specified by the parties to the legal agreement.
